vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (không khí, cảnh đẹp)
vocab.example: Sometimes I prefer to just soak up the atmosphere of a stunning landscape before I even think about taking my phone out.

vocab.meaning: ghi lại, thu lại trên (thiết bị, phim)
vocab.example: I try to capture the essence of the mountains on camera, but often the lens doesn't do the reality justice.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ bắt gặp, vô tình tìm thấy
vocab.example: The best views I've ever photographed were those I stumbled upon by accident while wandering off the main trails.

vocab.meaning: phóng to, tập trung cận cảnh vào
vocab.example: When I see a particularly intricate detail in a vista, I like to zoom in on it to create a more abstract composition.
Social media provides a great platform to show off the breathtaking views I encounter during my travels.

vocab.meaning: căn chỉnh khung hình, sắp xếp bố cục
vocab.example: I take my time to frame up the shot properly, ensuring the horizon is perfectly level.

vocab.meaning: loại bỏ (những yếu tố không mong muốn)
vocab.example: A good photographer knows how to filter out distracting elements like power lines to focus solely on the natural beauty.

vocab.meaning: làm nổi bật, làm hiện rõ (màu sắc, chi tiết)
vocab.example: The golden hour light really helps to bring out the vibrant textures of the cliffs and the sea.

vocab.meaning: nhìn ra xa, bao quát một không gian
vocab.example: My favorite photos are usually taken from high vantage points that look out over the entire city skyline.
Taking photos of spectacular scenery is my way of holding onto those fleeting moments of awe forever.
